description_long: This is a thick, hardcover book with a textured black cover and a prominent silver emblem on the front. The cover features a stylized flame or leaf-like symbol, rendered in a metallic finish, giving it a formal and distinguished appearance. The book's edges are clean and the pages are white, tightly bound within the sturdy cover. The title is printed in large, bold, silver letters above the emblem, standing out against the dark background. The spine is also black with the title printed vertically in silver, matching the front cover's style. The overall design is minimalistic and elegant, with no visible illustrations or decorative elements beyond the emblem and text.
description: A thick, black hardcover book with a silver emblem and bold silver title on the front, featuring a textured surface and clean white pages.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the silver emblem and bold title on a textured black background.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the top, highlighting the emblem and the title's orientation, with the textured cover clearly visible.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the bottom edge, displaying the white page block and the reversed title and emblem on the cover.
description_view_3: The spine is visible, showing the vertical silver title on a black textured background, with the book's thickness apparent.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with a textured finish and features the title 'Sacra Bibbia' printed vertically in silver. The design is simple and matches the front cover's style.
